title: Create: SatisFactory
description: Master the art of automation with a lightweight, high-performance toolkit. Featuring Create Aeronautics, this pack transforms your machines into dynamic physical contraptions with real-world momentum and interaction. No bloat, just pure engineering.
body:
# CREATE SatisFactory | Aeronautics Update!

**Stop mining. Start engineering.** **Create: SatisFactory** is a specialized **NeoForge** modpack designed for one goal: transforming Minecraft into a large-scale industrial simulator. Inspired by ***Satisfactory*** and ***Factorio***, this pack encourages you to think about production lines, logic, and efficiency.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe15db130a84f124f52bf220eba9bae6cb53aa10.png)

---

### THE FACTORY MUST GROW
* **Deep Automation:** Master mechanical power through gears, belts, and pulleys. Every machine in your factory is a part of the world that moves.
* **Create Aeronautics Physics:** Break away from the grid. Build large structures that go beyond static blocks and function with **real-world physics and mechanical inertia**.
* **Logistics & Transport:** Create large train networks and complicated belt systems to move resources across chunks.
* **Tiered Progression:** You don’t just "craft" items. You design assembly lines that evolve from hand-cranked tools to fully automated megabases.

---

### ENGINEER’S TOOLKIT
* **Physical Entities:** Move beyond static blocks. With **Aeronautics**, your designs become dynamic entities that follow the laws of physics.
* **Optimized Performance:** Specifically tuned to handle thousands of moving parts and complex physical setups without slowing down your game.
* **Long-Term Goals:** A progression-driven experience aimed at players who want to invest hundreds of hours perfecting a single factory.

---

### CREDITS & ACKNOWLEDGMENTS
This modpack would not be possible without the amazing talent of the modding community:
* **The Create Team:** A heartfelt thank you to **simibubi** and the entire original **Create Mod** team. Your work revolutionized Minecraft with mechanical engineering and set the stage for this new way to play.
* **Team Simulated:** A special mention and a huge thank you to the developers of **Create Aeronautics**. Your integration of physics and dynamic contraptions is the core of this update and elevates the industrial experience to new heights.
* **Addon Developers:** Thank you to all the creators of the various addons included in this pack. Your efforts to expand the Create ecosystem offer endless automation and aesthetic possibilities.

---

### SERVER MODPACK
We've created a mod pack ready for installation **ONLY** on a server. Enjoy! [Create: Satisfactory Server](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create-satisfactory-server)

---

> **Created by Dinner | Froggy Studio**
